ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
When enabled, the copied link will use the node's heading as display text: [[file.canvas#id|Title]].
When disabled, only the bare link is copied: [[file.canvas#id]].
ast.target: 启用后，复制的链接将使用节点的标题作为显示文本：[[file.canvas#id|标题]]。\n禁用后，仅复制裸链接：[[file.canvas#id]]。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which heading level to use as the link title. "Any" picks the first heading of any level (H1–H6).
ast.target: 使用哪个标题级别作为链接标题。“任意”会选择第一个任意级别（H1–H6）的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Show pop-up notices for successful copies and errors.
Disable for a quieter experience.
ast.target: 为成功复制和错误显示弹出通知。\n禁用以获得更安静的体验。
